title: Cauliflower Fritters with Piquant Aioli
description: A crispy and flavorful French-inspired snack or side dish made with cauliflower, flatbread, and a tangy piquant aioli.
instructions: Grate the cauliflower and squeeze out excess moisture.
In a bowl, mix together cauliflower, flatbread, piquant, turkish, eggs, parmesan, and garlic.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Using a spoon, drop small amounts of the mixture onto a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Drizzle with olive oil and gently toss to coat.
Bake for 20-25 minutes, or until crispy and golden brown.
Meanwhile, prepare the piquant aioli by mixing together piquant and mayonnaise.
Serve the fritters hot with a side of piquant aioli for dipping.
